'''鈭歝h-f-ch-t''' ('''kachafchetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:varitype|varitype]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:varitype|varitype]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-f-ch-t
|-
! Lemma
| kachafchetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichafchetoko|thichafchetoko]] || [[word:jichafchetoko|jichafchetoko]] || [[word:shichafchetoko|shichafchetoko]] || [[word:kichafchetoko|kichafchetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchafchetoko|thuthuchafchetoko]] || [[word:jujuchafchetoko|jujuchafchetoko]] || [[word:shushuchafchetoko|shushuchafchetoko]] || [[word:kukuchafchetoko|kukuchafchetoko]]
|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
